name: Quick Applesauce Muffins
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1/4 cup Sugar
2 tablespoons Butter or margarine, melted
1/4 teaspoon Cinnamon
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Combine Bisquick, 1/4 cup sugar, and 1 teaspoon cinnamon in a bowl. In another bowl, whisk together applesauce, milk, egg, and cooking oil until well mixed. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until just combined. Fill greased muffin pans two-thirds full with batter. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean. Allow muffins to cool slightly before removing from pans. Mix remaining sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl. Dip tops of muffins in melted butter, then roll in sugar-cinnamon mixture. Makes 12 muffins.
